title: Giant Christmas Tree
description: Adds a giant Christmas tree to snowy plains and taiga biomes.
body:
Giant Christmas Tree

This simple mod Adds a giant Christmas tree to snowy plains and snowy taiga biomes.

![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56743b23195c39658e319c46ec4185f66997665b.jpeg)

- The terrain around the tree tree is designed to blend naturally with the snowy biomes.
- perfect spot to build a cozy christmas base nearby
- Inside the presents hanging on the tree, you can find small loot rewards.

![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/befaedc70745ecda6cc737bb5bc63c40a00b93b7.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
